case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Rechecked 1260-1440s emailservice. Mem dev=+12329 to +24843 persists across all windows, confirming exhaustion. Latency.p90 dev=+1388 to +5494 aligns with mem spikes. Traces show normal internal latency, validating mem as root cause. Ranking confirmed.

Final RCA confirms emailservice memory exhaustion (dev=+12k to +25k) as primary cause. Sustained mem spikes align with latency anomalies. Traces/logs validate normal internal behavior, ruling out propagation. Top1=emailservice_mem.
